---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- Clear description of the proposed feature -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How would this feature work? -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternatives? -->

## Child Safety Impact
<!-- How does this feature affect child safety? -->
<!-- Will it require parent approval? -->

## Responsible AI Considerations

### Fairness
<!-- Does this feature treat all users fairly? -->

### Reliability & Safety
<!-- How does this feature ensure safety and reliability? -->

### Privacy & Security
<!-- What are the privacy and security implications? -->

### Inclusiveness
<!-- Is this feature accessible to all users? -->

### Transparency
<!-- Can decisions made by this feature be explained? -->

### Accountability
<!-- Who is responsible for this feature's outcomes? -->

## Implementation Considerations

### Architecture Impact
<!-- Which layers (L1-L9) does this affect? -->

### Agent or Service?
<!-- Is this an agent (proposes) or service (decides/enforces)? -->

### PDP Integration
<!-- Will this require new policy rules? -->

### Audit Requirements
<!-- What needs to be logged? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Any other relevant information, diagrams, or references -->
